Package kp.company.controller

Class DepartmentController

java.lang.Object
kp.company.controller.DepartmentController
@Controller public class DepartmentController extends Object
The web controller for the Department.

    • startDepartmentEditing

      @GetMapping("/startDepartmentEditing") public String startDepartmentEditing(long departmentId, org.springframework.ui.Model model)
      Starts the editing of the Department.
      Parameters:
      departmentId - the id of the Department
      model - the Model
      Returns:
      the view name

    • saveDepartment

      @PostMapping(value="/finishDepartmentEditing", params="save") public String saveDepartment(@Valid @Valid Department department, org.springframework.validation.BindingResult bindingResult)
      Saves the Department.
      Parameters:
      department - the Department
      bindingResult - the BindingResult
      Returns:
      the view name

    • cancelDepartmentEditing

      @PostMapping(value="/finishDepartmentEditing", params="cancel") public String cancelDepartmentEditing(@RequestParam("id") long departmentId)
      Cancels the editing of the Department.
      Parameters:
      departmentId - the id of the Department
      Returns:
      the view name

      departmentId - the id of the Department

      the view name
